title: FLOSS Weekly 583: California Consumer Privacy Act Tools
summary:
CCPA.Doc Searls talks with Jonathan Bennet and Don Marti who is an expert on the California Consumer Privacy Act. They discuss how the CCPA is vital to the open-source community.Thanks to a new privacy law, California residents now have protections over the sale of their private online data. Here's your chance to try it out yourself, by participating in a Consumer Reports study: https://volunteer.consumerreports.org/datarightsstudy
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email floss@twit.tv.
Thanks to Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
